name: release-approval
description: Persist and validate release-approval role state before page, mail, or verifier side effects.

interface.longDescription: Stores release-approval request, page, decision, SMTP, and audit-chain state for a single role identity. This task intentionally stops at config, protocol, and SQLite state boundaries; page serving, browser launch, mail send, and verifier workflows land later.
defaultPrompt: Inspect the release-approval role state core
Validate a release approval request payload
